subject: Physics
overall_learning_objectives: Explain reflection of light and the law of reflection
Identify different types of mirrors and their properties
Describe image formation in plane mirrors
Compare concave and convex mirrors and their uses
Understand the basic concept of lenses
Relate mirrors and lenses to everyday applications

lesson_plan.title: Nature of Light and Reflection
topics_covered: Incident ray, reflected ray and normal

lesson_plan.title: Law of Reflection
topics_covered: Statement of the law of reflection
Angle of incidence and angle of reflection
student_activities: Measure angles of incidence and reflection using diagrams
Discuss examples of reflection in daily life

lesson_plan.title: Plane Mirrors and Image Characteristics
student_activities: List characteristics of plane mirror images

lesson_plan.title: Concave and Convex Mirrors
topics_covered: Structure of concave and convex mirrors
student_activities: Identify mirrors used in vehicles, torches and shaving mirrors
Compare properties of concave and convex mirrors

lesson_plan.title: Introduction to Lenses
student_activities: Observe magnification using a convex lens

teacher_tip: Encourage students to observe mirrors and lenses in everyday devices such as vehicles, cameras, and spectacles to strengthen conceptual understanding.
